title: Progressive Web Apps and the Power of Service Workers

questions.sentence: Progressive Web App's PWAs aim to bridge the gap between websites and native mobile applications providing a fast reliable and engaging experience
The core technology that enables traditional web pages to behave like native apps is the Service Worker
A service worker is a specialized JavaScript file that runs in the background separate from the main browser thread
It acts as a programmable network proxy allowing you to intercept network requests and cache resources for offline use

By implementing a PWA strategy developers can ensure their applications remain functional and responsive even in low connectivity environments significantly improving the overall user retention and satisfaction
